auditTitle: Roshani Pizza Menu Portal — Comprehensive Audit
status: COMPLETED — Token t=1 invalid, site showed QR error screen. All screens analyzed from DOM inspection.

console.note: Stale cross-tab errors (admin/rider portals) include: AppCheck ReCAPTCHA errors, Firebase auth/invalid-credential, ERR_CACHE_READ_FAILURE for Firebase CDN scripts, and 'Provided AppCheck credentials are invalid' warning. These are NOT from the menu portal itself.

bottomNavVerification.eventBindingMethod: Likely uses event delegation (no inline onclick), standard JS SPA pattern
bottomNavVerification.functionalVerification: Could not verify due to invalid token (app blocks navigation). But event listeners use window-level delegation.

cartScreen.cartSummaryText: Your Cart (Table 07) | Your Name * | Mobile Number * | Guests − 1 + | Discount Code (Optional) Apply | This Order ₹0 | Tax (5%) ₹0 | Service Charge (10%) ₹0 | Discount -₹0 | Total ₹0 | PLACE ORDER

customizeScreen.summaryText: Dish Name ₹0 | Size | Add-ons | Special Instructions (Optional) | − 1 + | ADD TO ORDER

screenWelcome.description: Welcome screen with TABLE 07 and START ORDERING button

screenMenu.description: Menu browser with category filters and dish cards
screenMenu.features: Has category filter pills, dish cards, running bill summary

screenCustomize.description: Dish customization with size, addons, qty

screenCart.description: Cart with discount input, tax rows, total, PLACE ORDER

screenTracking.description: Order tracking with order number, running bill, + Order More Items, REQUEST BILL, Call Waiter

screenWaiter.description: Waiter assistance: CALL WAITER, REQUEST WATER, REQUEST BILL, CLEAN TABLE

screenInvalid.description: Shown when QR token is invalid — currently visible screen
screenInvalid.text: This QR code is invalid — The table link could not be verified

screenBillGenerated.description: Bill confirmation screen with BACK TO MENU

headingHierarchy.issue: H1 → H3 skip — no H2 present

skipLink.issue: Skip link targets #screenMenu which is hidden (display:none) when token is invalid — navigates to a hidden element

touchTargetAudit.note: On invalid token screen, only 'Skip to main content' link is visible (187x38px, fails 48px min). Other elements are not visible.

hiddenElementsAudit.note: All 35 interactive elements exist in DOM but are hidden. When active, many would likely pass 48px (bottom nav, buttons, etc.) but cannot be verified without a valid token.

issues.description: Heading hierarchy jumps from H1 ('Roshani Pizza Menu') directly to H3 ('This QR code is invalid'), skipping H2 entirely
issues.recommendation: Change the H3 to H2, or add an H2 between them

issues.description: 29/35 (83%) interactive elements lack aria-label attributes. Critical navigation buttons (Menu, Cart, Status, History, Promos, START ORDERING, ADD TO ORDER, PLACE ORDER) and icon-only buttons (−, +, back buttons) are missing labels
issues.recommendation: Add aria-label to all interactive elements, especially icon-only buttons and navigation items

issues.description: Skip link targets #screenMenu, but when token is invalid, screenMenu is display:none — skipping lands on a hidden element
issues.recommendation: Redirect skip link to #main-content wrapper or use dynamic target based on current screen

issues.description: The only visible interactive element ('Skip to main content' link) is 38px tall — below the 48px WCAG minimum touch target. Admin sidebar nav buttons are 38px tall (fails 48px). Many admin panel buttons (24px, 36px) fail touch target minimum
issues.recommendation: Ensure all interactive elements meet 48x48px minimum touch target size per WCAG 2.2

issues.description: Firebase AppCheck ReCAPTCHA errors across all portals (admin, rider, menu) — 'AppCheck: ReCAPTCHA error' and 'Provided AppCheck credentials are invalid'. This affects Firebase connectivity and data sync
issues.recommendation: Verify AppCheck configuration in Firebase Console. Ensure reCAPTCHA site key is correctly configured and the domain is whitelisted

issues.description: Using ?t=1 as a token parameter redirects from menu portal to admin dashboard (roshani-sudha-admin.web.app), bypassing the admin login screen entirely
issues.recommendation: Investigate if t=1 is a hardcoded fallback token. Consider removing or securing it to prevent unauthorized admin access

issues.description: No valid table token was available for testing. All token-linked features (START ORDERING flow, add-to-cart, full menu browsing, checkout) could not be interactively verified
issues.recommendation: Provide a valid table QR token (e.g., from Firebase /tables node) for full end-to-end testing

summary.verdict: The menu portal has a solid SPA architecture with 10 well-separated screens. Core functionality (cart, customize, tracking, waiter, promos, history) is structurally complete. However, accessibility needs significant improvement: 83% of interactive elements lack ARIA labels, heading hierarchy skips levels, skip link targets hidden elements, and touch targets are below WCAG minimums. The Firebase AppCheck ReCAPTCHA error is a critical issue affecting all portals. The t=1 redirect to admin dashboard is a potential security concern.
